channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: ‘Israel targeting Iran’s security forces may aim to encourage uprising’
item.description: ‘Israel targeting Iran’s security forces may aim to encourage uprising’ says director of the Iran Program at the MEI.

item.title: The Iranian moment: A leap into the unknown
item.description: In the past century, Iran has undergone two major transformations. A third seems to be on its way.

item.title: Iran allows limited Indian shipping through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has allowed some Indian vessels through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Israel bombs Basij checkpoints in Tehran as US, Iran trade fire and jabs
item.description: Drone strikes have hit the paramilitary's heavily armed checkpoints this week, Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said.

item.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will not be reopened to US ships
item.description: A member of Iran’s Expediency Council says the Strait of Hormuz will remain closed to US ships.

item.title: Vatican envoy visits Lebanese church after priest killed in shelling
item.description: The Vatican envoy to Lebanon visited Qlayaa, after a priest was killed in an Israeli attack.

item.title: Why is Iran’s Kharg Island important?
item.description: US President Donald Trump shared a video of strikes on Kharg Island, Iran’s main oil export hub.

item.title: Fire and damage after strike on US embassy compound in Baghdad
item.description: A strike on the heavily fortified United States embassy compound in Baghdad caused a fire and damage to the complex.

item.title: Two Indian ships cross Strait of Hormuz as Iran says it allowed passage
item.description: Iran's envoy to New Delhi says Tehran allowed some Indian vessels to pass the Strait in rare exception to the blockade.

item.title: Another 5 Palestinians killed in Israel’s genocide in Gaza amid wider war
item.description: Israeli forces carry out daily attacks on besieged Gaza, as humanitarian conditions amid Iran war worsen.
